zh.lifeSummary: 當Alan de Singleton於大約1226年出生在英國藍卡爾吉可哈姆時，他的父親William de Singleton24歲，母親Catherine de Meols17歲。他和Katherine Conyers至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1292年之前在英國英格蘭藍卡爾普雷斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alan de Singleton于大约1226年出生在英国藍卡爾吉可哈姆时，他的父亲William de Singleton24岁，母亲Catherine de Meols17岁。他和Katherine Conyers至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1292年之前在英国英格兰藍卡爾普雷斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Singleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Singleton (Lancashire), probably from Old English scingol ‘shingle, wooden roof tile’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Bearers of this surname are said to be descended from Ughtred de Sinleton, holder of lands in Amounderness wapentake (Lancashire) c. 1160–90. This name was first recorded in Ireland in 1308 and firmly established in Louth and Monaghan during the 17th century.
habitational name from Singleton (Sussex), probably from Old English sængel, sengel ‘bundle, tuft’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Shingleton
meanings: English: late medieval variant of   Singleton  .

nameMeanings.name: Alan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Alan de Singleton was born about 1226, in Kirkham, Lancashire, England, his father, William de Singleton, was 24 and his mother, Catherine de Meols, was 17. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Katherine Conyers. He died before 1292, in Preston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alan de Singleton est né environ 1226, à Kirkham, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, William de Singleton, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Catherine de Meols, avait 17 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Katherine Conyers. Il est décédé avant 1292, à Preston, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alan de Singleton um 1226 in Kirkham, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Singleton 24 und seine Mutter Catherine de Meols 17. Er hatte mit Katherine Conyers mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb vor 1292 in Preston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alan de Singleton è nato il circa 1226 nel Kirkham, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, William de Singleton, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Catherine de Meols, aveva 17 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Katherine Conyers. Morì prima del 1292, nel Preston, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alan de Singletonが約1226年にイギリスランカシュアイアキルクハムで生まれた時，父William de Singletonは24歳，母Catherine de Meolsは17歳であった。彼はKatherine Conyersとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1292年以前にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアプレストンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alan de Singleton(이)가 대략 1226년 영국 랭카실르 커크함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Singleton(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine de Meols(은)는 17세였다. 그는 Katherine Conyers(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1292년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 플레스턴에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alan de Singleton nasceu aproximadamente 1226, em Kirkham, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Singleton, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Catherine de Meols, tinha 17 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Katherine Conyers. Ele faleceu antes 1292, em Preston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alan de Singleton родился около 1226 г. в местности кирхам, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Singleton было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Catherine de Meols, 17. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Katherine Conyers. Он умер перед 1292 г. в местности престон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.
